title: Salter Arc Kitchen Scale – Digital Food Weighing Scales For Precise Cooking/Baking, Slim Platform for Compact Storage, Add & Weigh/Tare Function, 3kg Capacity, Battery Included, Black
features: ELECTRONIC KITCHEN SCALE: Make cooking fun for your family and create bakes for everyone to enjoy! From homemade biscuits and cakes to fresh pizza dough and pie crusts.

ADD & WEIGH: Measure multiple ingredients together at the same time! Use the add and weigh function to measure up to 3kg of ingredients together. Perfect when baking you can add both flour and sugar together!

WEIGH STRAIGHT AWAY: This electronic food scale has a battery included so you can weigh straight away! This scale comes with a 15-year guarantee so you can keep cooking and save on precious countertop space thanks to the slim design.

EASY CLEAN PLATFORM: Weigh ingredients in one bowl or directly onto the easy clean, platform. Perfect for precise weighing, this food scale has a 3kg maximum capacity and measurements are displayed on the easy-read LCD display.
COMPACT STORAGE: With an elegant gloss black design, this digital scale is compact for quick and easy storage, saving you precious countertop and cupboard space!
description: From the brand Previous page Over 260 years of precision Founded in 1760 as a family business, Salter has been a reliable partner in the kitchen and household for over 260 years. As the UK's most popular weighing method, we have started as a scale brand and have now expanded our range to cookware, bakeware, kitchen electrical appliances and food preparation. Experts for everyday use Rely on the experts for everyday use From coffee makers to frying pans - whether cooking for family or entertaining friends - Salter offers you all the products you need for everyday use. Busy kitchens need salter.. We understand the pressures of everyday life and have therefore developed a wide range of different products in all major kitchen categories that allow you to have a homemade meal faster and easier every day. Rely on us - in the kitchen and beyond! Next page
